scripts.build: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run sync:static && pnpm run build:server
scripts.sync:static: mkdir -p packages/server/internal/static/public && find packages/server/internal/static/public -mindepth 1 ! -name .gitkeep -delete && cp -R packages/client/dist/. packages/server/internal/static/public/
scripts.test:all: pnpm check:file-lines && pnpm check:deploy && pnpm --filter @qreminder/client test:run && pnpm --filter @qreminder/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @qreminder/client typecheck:all && pnpm --dir packages/server test && pnpm test:e2e
